allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('share'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('social'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('external'\)\); console.log\(names.join\(', '\)\)")
